productDisplayName: Timberland Men Claremont Popl Blue Shirt
description: CompositionLight blue full sleeve shirt made of 100% organic cotton,  with tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar,  appliqued brand logo on the facing placket, patch pocket on left chest with green thread detailing and embroidered logo , full length buttoned placket with embroidered logo on right sleeve, and curved hemline FittingRegularWash care Machine wash in cold water Wash dark colours separately Use only non-chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry normal at low heat Warm iron when needed Dry cleanable Time to look like the classic rugged hero right out of a Hollywood movie! This light blue shirt from timberland has been specially dyed to give it a weathered look, making it ideal for outdoor wear. Team it with well-fitting jeans and rugged boots to look like a young Indiana Jones!This shirt has been manufactured in an environment-friendly manner, with the aim to reduce the Carbon FootprintModel statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
